commands.name: settings
commands.description: Open settings menu

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Open provider setup

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Toggle plan mode (agent plans before executing)

commands.name: plan-review
commands.description: Re-open the plan review for the latest plan (plan mode only)

commands.name: vibe
commands.description: Toggle vibe mode (direct persistent fast/good worker sessions; read-only toolset)

commands.name: goal
commands.description: Toggle goal mode (persistent autonomous objective for this session)

commands.name: guided-goal
commands.description: Interview and refine a goal before enabling goal mode

commands.name: loop
commands.description: Toggle loop mode. While enabled, the next prompt you send re-submits after every yield. Esc cancels the current iteration; /loop again to disable.

commands.name: queue
commands.description: Queue a message for after the agent yields

commands.name: model
commands.description: Switch model for this session

commands.name: switch
commands.description: Switch model for this session (same as alt+p)

commands.name: fast
commands.description: Toggle priority service tier (OpenAI service_tier=priority, Anthropic speed=fast)

commands.name: prewalk
commands.description: Switch to a fast/cheap model at the next action (works even without --prewalk)

commands.name: advisor
commands.description: Toggle the advisor (a second model that reviews each turn and injects notes)

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export session to HTML file

commands.name: dump
commands.description: Copy session transcript to clipboard (and write LLM request JSON to tmp)

commands.name: share
commands.description: Share session via an encrypted link (share server or secret gist)

commands.name: collab
commands.description: Share this session live via a relay

commands.name: join
commands.description: Join a shared collab session

commands.name: leave
commands.description: Leave the collab session

commands.name: browser
commands.description: Toggle browser headless vs visible mode

commands.name: copy
commands.description: Pick text or code from the conversation to copy

commands.name: todo
commands.description: View or modify the agent's todo list

commands.name: session
commands.description: Session management commands

commands.name: jobs
commands.description: Show async background jobs status

commands.name: usage
commands.description: Show provider usage and limits

commands.name: stats
commands.description: Launch the local stats dashboard

commands.name: changelog
commands.description: Show changelog entries

commands.name: hotkeys
commands.description: Show all keyboard shortcuts

commands.name: tools
commands.description: Show tools currently visible to the agent

commands.name: context
commands.description: Show estimated context usage breakdown

commands.name: extensions
commands.description: Open Extension Control Center dashboard

commands.name: agents
commands.description: Open Agent Control Center dashboard

commands.name: branch
commands.description: Create a new branch from a previous message

commands.name: fork
commands.description: Create a new fork from a previous message

commands.name: tree
commands.description: Navigate session tree (switch branches)

commands.name: login
commands.description: Login with OAuth provider

commands.name: logout
commands.description: Logout from OAuth provider

commands.name: mcp
commands.description: Manage MCP servers (add, list, remove, test)

commands.name: ssh
commands.description: Manage SSH hosts (add, list, remove)

commands.name: new
commands.description: Start a new session

commands.name: fresh
commands.description: Reset provider stream state without changing the local transcript

commands.name: drop
commands.description: Delete the current session and start a new one

commands.name: compact
commands.description: Manually compact the session context

commands.name: shake
commands.description: Drop heavy content from context (tool results, large blocks)

commands.name: handoff
commands.description: Hand off session context to a new session

commands.name: resume
commands.description: Resume a different session

commands.name: btw
commands.description: Ask an ephemeral side question using the current session context

commands.name: tan
commands.description: Run a full background agent on tangential work

commands.name: omfg
commands.description: Forge a TTSR rule from a complaint to stop a recurring behavior

commands.name: retry
commands.description: Retry the last failed agent turn

commands.name: debug
commands.description: Open debug tools selector

commands.name: memory
commands.description: Inspect and operate memory maintenance

commands.name: rename
commands.description: Rename the current session

commands.name: move
commands.description: Move the current session to a different directory

commands.name: exit
commands.description: Exit the application

commands.name: marketplace
commands.description: Manage marketplace plugin sources and installed plugins

commands.name: plugins
commands.description: View and manage installed plugins

commands.name: reload-plugins
commands.description: Reload all plugins (skills, commands, hooks, tools, agents, MCP)

commands.name: force
commands.description: Force next turn to use a specific tool

commands.name: pause
commands.description: Freeze all agents (main, subagents, advisor) until resumed

commands.name: quit
commands.description: Quit the application
